title: euphrasia arctica var. disjuncta
intro: Euphrasia arctica var. disjuncta, also known as the Arctic eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Euphrasia. It is a member of the family Scrophulariaceae and is native to the Arctic regions of North America. The Arctic eyebright has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for soothing eye irritations, reducing swelling, and promoting overall eye health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in eye washes, salves, and infusions to take advantage of its health benefits, including reducing eye fatigue, improving vision, and protecting against infections.
